title: Savory Crispy Korean Seaweed Crumble
description: This egg-free Korean seaweed dish combines savory flavors with a crispy texture, perfect for a solo dinner featuring seasoned rice vinegar and boiling.

ingredients.name: 1 cup dried seaweed
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 4 hours or overnight

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons rice vinegar (seasoned with salt, sugar, and garlic)

instructions: Drain and pat dry the soaked seaweed.
Place seaweed on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Mix rice vinegar in a small bowl and brush evenly over the seaweed, making sure it's well coated.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Garnish with sesame oil before serving.
